files.patch:
@@ -53,1 +53,1 @@
-    // Non-null when body is built, and therefore bound to operation
+    // Non-null when body is built, and therefore child of an operation
@@ -453,1 +453,2 @@
-     * When the body builder is built any associated block builders are also considered built.
+     * When the body builder is {@link Body.Builder#build(Op) built} all associated {@link Block.Builder block builders}
+     * are also built and their blocks become children of the body.

@@ -70,2 +70,1 @@ - * operation, the root of a code model, or as some operation within a code model (that is built or in the process of - * being built). + * operation, the root of a code model, or as some operation within a code model (that is built or unbuilt). @@ -73,2 +72,3 @@ - * When an operation is bound to a parent block that is being built that block is not accessible as a {@link #parent()} - * until the block is fully built. + * Access to the bound operation's {@link #parent()} block is inaccessible until it is built by its block builder. + * The same applies if the parent block is accessed indirectly via the operation result's + * {@link Value#declaringBlock() declaring block}. @@ -371,1 +371,1 @@ - if (isBoundAsRoot() || (result != null && result.block.isBound())) { + if (isBoundAsRoot() || (result != null && result.block.isBuilt())) { @@ -388,0 +388,2 @@ + *

+ * The operation's parent block is the same as the operation result's {@link Value#declaringBlock declaring block}. @@ -390,1 +392,2 @@ - * @throws IllegalStateException if an unbuilt block is encountered. + * @throws IllegalStateException if the parent block is unbuilt. + * @see Value#declaringBlock() @@ -398,2 +401,2 @@ - if (!result.block.isBound()) { - throw new IllegalStateException("Parent block is not built"); + if (!result.block.isBuilt()) { + throw new IllegalStateException("Parent block is unbuilt");
